suggestions.label: Complex numbers
suggestions.text: Explain how to multiply complex numbers in polar form.

suggestions.label: Worked example
suggestions.text: Show me a worked example of proof by induction involving inequalities.

suggestions.label: Integration
suggestions.text: Show me how to integrate using partial fractions with quadratic factors.

suggestions.label: Vectors in 3D
suggestions.text: Explain how to find the shortest distance between two skew lines.

suggestions.label: Mechanics
suggestions.text: Explain simple harmonic motion and how to derive the equation x = a sin(nt + α).

suggestions.label: Proof
suggestions.text: Show me a proof by contradiction example.

suggestions.label: Test me
suggestions.text: Give me a challenging practice question on conics.

suggestions.label: Explain
suggestions.text: Explain the difference between parametric and Cartesian equations for conics.

suggestions.label: Polynomials
suggestions.text: Explain how to find multiple roots of a polynomial using calculus.

suggestions.text: Give me an HSC Extension 2 style question on volumes of revolution.
